name: WP Activity Logger
upgrade_notice: Shows system-triggered actions clearly instead of Unknown user and preserves better actor labels in the log viewer.
author: Dmytro Kovalenko

sections.description: Protected WordPress activity logger with a hidden owner-only audit screen, a subtle Logs link on the Plugins screen, Edmonton-based timestamps, clearer system and deleted-user labels in the viewer, more reliable login, logout, and post update logging, nightly private-server updates, and automatic cleanup of logs older than 30 days.
